query:
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN pv.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'COM_VALIDACAO' ELSE 'SEM_VALIDACAO' END AS estado,
  COUNT(*) AS quantidade
FROM pdis p
JOIN users u ON p.colaboradorId = u.id
LEFT JOIN pdi_validacoes pv ON pv.pdiId = p.id
WHERE u.role = 'lider'
GROUP BY CASE WHEN pv.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'COM_VALIDACAO' ELSE 'SEM_VALIDACAO' END;
